messages.subject: [R-meta] Meta-Analysis in R - online course - 11-14 May
messages.subject_clean: [R-meta] Meta-Analysis in R - online course - 11-14 May
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
 
due to a last-minute cancellation, we have 1 seat is again available for the ?Meta-Analysis in R? course (11?14 May, online).

 
 
 
This hands-on training offers a practical introduction to evidence synthesis?from formulating research questions and conducting literature searches to effect size calculation, meta-analysis, meta-regression, and interpreting results. We place strong emphasis on heterogeneity and publication bias.
 
 
 
Sessions are fully practical, using R and widely adopted packages (e.g., metafor, orchaRd), with real datasets and reproducible workflows provided throughout.
 
 
 
More info & registration: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/metain-r/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/metain-r/ ) 
 
 
 
Feel free to reply if you have any questions.
 
Best regards,
Carlo
 
 
 
--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D


Physalia-courses DIRECTOR

info at physalia-courses.org

mobile: +49 17645230846

[ Bluesky ]( https://bsky.app/profile/physaliacourses.bsky.social ) [ Linkedin ]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/physalia-courses-a64418127/ )
 
	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
